title: 第 14 課｜中心力場：角動量如何決定軌道｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
當位能只依賴到固定中心的距離，角動量守恆會讓軌道限制在單一平面。本課從 M = mr²φ̇ 說明等時掃過等面積的克卜勒第二定律，並以有效位能 Ueff(r) = U(r) + M²/(2mr²) 判斷徑向運動的範圍。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 14 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 14 | Central Fields and Angular Momentum | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
When the potential depends only on distance from a fixed centre, conservation of angular momentum confines the orbit to a plane. This lesson connects M = mr²φ̇ to Kepler's equal-area law and uses the effective potential Ueff(r) = U(r) + M²/(2mr²) to determine the allowed radial motion.

Lesson 14 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
